case_title: LINDA YEE SUGAYA VS. OLIVER LEFITI, DECEASED; ESTATE OF OLIVER LEFITE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-29-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-29-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-14-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUGAYA, LINDA YEE AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVER LEFITI, DECEASED; ESTATE OF OLIVER LEFITE DECEASED DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-03-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-01-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-18-2008
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ, CSR# 7782. (212)
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-19-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-03-2008 CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUGAYA, LINDA YEE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
